name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsThinking(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsHungry(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsEating(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "free", ![RIGHT(i)] = "free"]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> {"free"} \cup 1..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag, maxNum


define

      maxNum' == maxNum
      flag' == flag

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)
           /\ UNCHANGED <<head, tail, count>>

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)
           /\ UNCHANGED <<head, tail, count>>

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = {currentTerm'}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers :
              /\ r \in readers
              /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in Readers :
                  /\ r \notin readers
                  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

       /\ chosenByBallot' = chosenByBallot

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES file, chunkSize, totalChunks, retransmitCount, maxRetries, sentChunks, receivedChunks, lostChunks

Init == /\ file \in Seq
        /\ chunkSize \in Nat
        /\ totalChunks = Len(file) \div chunkSize
        /\ retransmitCount = 0
        /\ maxRetries = 3
        /\ sentChunks = <<>>
        /\ receivedChunks = <<>>
        /\ lostChunks = <<>> 

Next == /\ sentChunks' == Append(sentChunks, file[retransmitCount \in 1..totalChunks])
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
        /\ lostChunks' = Append(lostChunks, IF Random < 0.1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE)
        /\ receivedChunks' = IF lostChunks[retransmitCount] THEN receivedChunks ELSE Append(receivedChunks, file[retransmitCount \in 1..totalChunks])
        /\ maxRetries' = maxRetries
        /\ file' = file
        /\ chunkSize' = chunkSize
        /\ totalChunks' = totalChunks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunkSize, totalChunks, retransmitCount, maxRetries, sentChunks, receivedChunks, lostChunks>>
